title: Tom Bell begins tenure as Leidos CEO
text: RESTON, Va. , May 3, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Leidos (NYSE:LDOS), a FORTUNE® 500 science and technology leader, today announced a new era of leadership for the half-century company as Thomas Bell began his tenure as CEO.

title: The 3 Most Promising Space Exploration Stocks for May 2023
text: While space may be the final frontier, more than a few enterprises previously labeled as the best space exploration stocks to buy appear to be on the cusp of requiring final arrangements if you catch my drift. However, a select few enterprises just might have what it takes to rise above the muck.

title: Leidos Holdings (LDOS) Q1 Earnings Miss, Revenues Rise Y/Y
text: Leidos Holdings' (LDOS) Q1 revenues of $3,699 million exceed the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 1.2%. The top line also improves 5.9% year over year.

title: Why Leidos Holdings Stock Is Falling Today
text: Leidos posted an earnings miss in the quarter, weighed down by lower-than-expected profitability in its civil unit. Its long-time CEO is stepping down.

title: Leidos (LDOS) Misses Q1 Earnings Estimates
text: Leidos (LDOS) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.47 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.59 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.58 per share a year ago.

title: Leidos Holdings, Inc. Reports First Quarter Fiscal Year 2023 Results
text: Revenues of $3.7 billion, up 6% year-over-year Net Income of $164 million; Adjusted EBITDA of $346 million Diluted Earnings per Share of $1.17, or $1.47 on a non-GAAP basis Net Bookings of $3.0 billion (book-to-bill ratio of 0.8) RESTON, Va. , May 2, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Leidos Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: LDOS), a FORTUNE 500® science and technology leader, today reported financial results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2023.

title: Leidos to Participate in the Goldman Sachs 2023 Industrials & Materials Conference
text: Live Audio Webcast Available on May 9, 2023, from 1:10 p.m. to 1:45 p.m.
